sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TD_PERMISSION ( "PERMISSION_ID", "PERMISSION_NAME", "PERMISSION_CODE", "RESOURCE_ID", "ACTION", "DESCRIPTION" ) VALUES ( #[permissionId], concat(#[resource], ':', #[action]), concat(#[resource], ':', #[action]), #[resource], #[action], concat(#[description], ' Condition:', ifnull(#[conditionExpr],'')) )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TD_PERMISSION SET "RESOURCE_ID" = #[resource], "ACTION" = #[action], "DESCRIPTION" = concat(#[description], ' Condition:', ifnull(#[conditionExpr],'')) WHERE "PERMISSION_ID" = #[permissionId]
sqlMap.select: SELECT "PERMISSION_ID", "RESOURCE_ID" as resource, "ACTION" as action, "DESCRIPTION" as description, '' as condition_expr FROM TD_PERMISSION WHERE "PERMISSION_ID" = #[permissionId]
SELECT "PERMISSION_ID", "RESOURCE_ID" as resource, "ACTION" as action, "DESCRIPTION" as description, '' as condition_expr FROM TD_PERMISSION WHERE "RESOURCE_ID" = ? AND "ACTION" = ?
SELECT "PERMISSION_ID", "RESOURCE_ID" as resource, "ACTION" as action, "DESCRIPTION" as description, '' as condition_expr FROM TD_PERMISSION ORDER BY "RESOURCE_ID", "ACTION"
